'''鈭歾-d-k''' ('''zoduk''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:know|know]]".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-d-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:know|know]]
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾-d-k
|-
! Lemma
| zoduk
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zadakithi|zadakithi]] || [[word:zadakiji|zadakiji]] || [[word:zadakishi|zadakishi]] || [[word:zadaki|zadaki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zadakuthuth|zadakuthuth]] || [[word:zadakujuj|zadakujuj]] || [[word:zadakushush|zadakushush]] || [[word:zadak|zadak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zadakuthu|zadakuthu]] || [[word:zadakuju|zadakuju]] || [[word:zadakushu|zadakushu]] || [[word:zadaku|zadaku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zadakufuth|zadakufuth]] || [[word:zadakufuj|zadakufuj]] || [[word:zadakufush|zadakufush]] || [[word:zadakuf|zadakuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zadakethe|zadakethe]] || [[word:zadakeje|zadakeje]] || [[word:zadakeshe|zadakeshe]] || [[word:zadake|zadake]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zadakothoth|zadakothoth]] || [[word:zadakojoj|zadakojoj]] || [[word:zadakoshosh|zadakoshosh]] || [[word:zadak|zadak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zadakotho|zadakotho]] || [[word:zadakojo|zadakojo]] || [[word:zadakosho|zadakosho]] || [[word:zadako|zadako]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zadakofoth|zadakofoth]] || [[word:zadakofoj|zadakofoj]] || [[word:zadakofosh|zadakofosh]] || [[word:zadakof|zadakof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zadak忙th忙|zadak忙th忙]] || [[word:zadak忙j忙|zadak忙j忙]] || [[word:zadak忙sh忙|zadak忙sh忙]] || [[word:zadak忙|zadak忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zadakathath|zadakathath]] || [[word:zadakajaj|zadakajaj]] || [[word:zadakashash|zadakashash]] || [[word:zadak|zadak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zadakatha|zadakatha]] || [[word:zadakaja|zadakaja]] || [[word:zadakasha|zadakasha]] || [[word:zadaka|zadaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zadakafath|zadakafath]] || [[word:zadakafaj|zadakafaj]] || [[word:zadakafash|zadakafash]] || [[word:zadakaf|zadakaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:zadakasha|zadakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gozadakasha|gozadakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokizadakasha|gokizadakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:zadakn眉sha|zadakn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gozadaknkn眉sha|gozadaknkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokizadakn眉sha|gokizadakn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zadaksh毛sha|zadaksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozadaknksh毛sha|gozadaknksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizadaksh毛sha|gokizadaksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zadakrosha|zadakrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozadaknkrosha|gozadaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizadakrosha|gokizadakrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zadakmusha|zadakmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gozadaknkmusha|gozadaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizadakmusha|gokizadakmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:zadaksherasha|zadaksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gozadaknksherasha|gozadaknksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokizadaksherasha|gokizadaksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:zadakngasha|zadakngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gozadaknkngasha|gozadaknkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokizadakngasha|gokizadakngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zadakyasha|zadakyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gozadaknkyasha|gozadaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokizadakyasha|gokizadakyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:zadakyamasha|zadakyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gozadaknkyamasha|gozadaknkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokizadakyamasha|gokizadakyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:zadakn眉sh毛sha|zadakn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozadaknkn眉sh毛sha|gozadaknkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizadakn眉sh毛sha|gokizadakn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zadakn眉rosha|zadakn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozadaknkn眉rosha|gozadaknkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizadakn眉rosha|gokizadakn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zadakn眉musha|zadakn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozadaknkn眉musha|gozadaknkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizadakn眉musha|gokizadakn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:zadaksh毛n眉sha|zadaksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozadaknksh毛n眉sha|gozadaknksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizadaksh毛n眉sha|gokizadaksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zadaksh毛rosha|zadaksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozadaknksh毛rosha|gozadaknksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizadaksh毛rosha|gokizadaksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zadaksh毛musha|zadaksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozadaknksh毛musha|gozadaknksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizadaksh毛musha|gokizadaksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:zadakron眉sha|zadakron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozadaknkron眉sha|gozadaknkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizadakron眉sha|gokizadakron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:zadakrosh毛sha|zadakrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozadaknkrosh毛sha|gozadaknkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizadakrosh毛sha|gokizadakrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zadakromusha|zadakromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozadaknkromusha|gozadaknkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizadakromusha|gokizadakromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:zadakmun眉sha|zadakmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozadaknkmun眉sha|gozadaknkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizadakmun眉sha|gokizadakmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:zadakmush毛sha|zadakmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozadaknkmush毛sha|gozadaknkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizadakmush毛sha|gokizadakmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zadakmurosha|zadakmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozadaknkmurosha|gozadaknkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizadakmurosha|gokizadakmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:zadak|zadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:z忙d忙k|z忙d忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hozadak|hozadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoz忙d忙k|hoz忙d忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozadak|hohozadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoz忙d忙k|hohoz忙d忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉zadak|n眉zadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉z忙d忙k|n眉z忙d忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉zadak|n眉n眉zadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉z忙d忙k|n眉n眉z忙d忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂zadak|n茂zadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂z忙d忙k|n茂z忙d忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂zadak|n茂n茂zadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂z忙d忙k|n茂n茂z忙d忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luzadak|luzadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luz忙d忙k|luz忙d忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzadak|luluzadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluz忙d忙k|luluz忙d忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lizadak|lizadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liz忙d忙k|liz忙d忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizadak|lilizadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliz忙d忙k|liliz忙d忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kozadak|kozadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koz忙d忙k|koz忙d忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozadak|kokozadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoz忙d忙k|kokoz忙d忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kezadak|kezadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kez忙d忙k|kez忙d忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezadak|kekezadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekez忙d忙k|kekez忙d忙k]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
